name: water-meter-ocr-cloud
description: Water meter OCR via Roboflow serverless inference — no local model required.

image_b64.label: Meter Image
image_b64.description: Base64 JPEG/PNG of the water meter. Auto-set when using file upload.

reference.label: Meter Reference ID
reference.description: Identifier stored with the image (e.g. MTR-001). Defaults to 'unknown'.

confidence_threshold.label: Confidence Threshold
confidence_threshold.description: Minimum detection confidence (0–1). Lower = more detections, possibly noisier.

api_key.label: Roboflow API Key
api_key.description: Overrides the ROBOFLOW_API_KEY env var for this request.

confidence_avg.label: Avg Confidence
confidence_avg.description: Mean confidence across all detected digits

digit_count.label: Digits Detected
digit_count.description: Number of digit bounding boxes found

original_url.label: Original Image
original_url.description: Presigned S3 URL to the raw uploaded image

annotated_url.label: Annotated Image
annotated_url.description: Presigned S3 URL to the image with bounding box overlays

detections.label: Detections
detections.description: Array of {bbox, class_name, score} for each detected digit
